data.name: GIFQuality_Bit8
data.value: Octree quantizer 256 رنگs (Slow encoding but better quality)

data.value: Auto increment alphanumeric case-insensitive (0 pad چپ using {n})

data.value: Auto increment number (0 pad چپ using {n})

data.value: Random line from a فایل (Use {filepath} to determine the فایل)
